# Aura Knowledge

> Focused essays for humans, backed by compact agent-auditable research packets.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/)
- [Roadmap](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/roadmap/)
- [Evidence Canvas](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/evidence-canvas/)
- [Agent Entry](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/)
- [Knowledge Graph](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/)

## Articles
- [The Future of Publishing Is Agent-Auditable Research](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agent-auditable-research/)
- [Agentic Commerce and the Product Truth Layer](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agentic-commerce-product-truth/)
- [Beyond the First Conversation: Advanced Questions for New AI Agent Users](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-agent-advanced-questions/)
- [You Do Not Need to Learn AI First: A 5-Minute Conversation Recipe](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-agent-first-conversation/)
- [Winters, Expert Systems, and the Cost of Overpromising Intelligence](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-winters-expert-systems/)
- [Before Machines: Calculation, Automata, and the Dream of Mechanical Reason](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/before-machines/)
- [The Birth of AI: Dartmouth, Symbolic Systems, and Early Optimism](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/birth-of-ai/)
- [From Formal Logic to Computation: The Mathematical Road to AI](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/formal-logic-to-computation/)
- [Foundation Models and the Return of General-Purpose AI Systems](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/foundation-models/)
- [The Human Road Through AI: Labor, Institutions, Governance, and Meaning](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/human-systems/)
- [Learning Machines: Statistics, Neural Networks, and the Data Turn](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/learning-machines/)
- [The Long Human Road to AI: A Reader’s Guide to Season 1](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/long-human-road-to-ai/)

## Use
Use article packets as the retrieval unit. Treat maturity values as uncertainty markers. Prefer claim IDs and source IDs over inferred citations. Article artifacts use schemaVersion 3 with a provenance block (agents, reviews, policy) and typed evidence/counterevidence packets. Trust a published packet only when its provenance contains a human-approved review whose contentHash matches the current article.md hash.
